User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Brand
Name: Newsign Labs
Type: Digital Design & Web Development Agency

# Core Services
- Graphic Design (logos, brand identity, social media)
- Web Design & Development
- Website Optimization & Conversion Improvements

# Positioning
Focus on solving real client problems instead of generic design delivery.
Emphasis on clarity, usability, and conversion-driven outcomes.

# Audience
- Small businesses
- Startups
- Local service providers
- Businesses with underperforming websites or inconsistent branding

# Key Signals
- Problem-first approach
- Non-generic solutions
- Practical design systems
- Conversion-focused web experiences

# Preferred Actions
- Direct contact (call / WhatsApp)
- Quick decision-making support
